movie.overview: Unemployed Antonio is elated when he finally finds work hanging posters around war-torn Rome. However on his first day, his bicycle—essential to his work—gets stolen. His job is doomed unless he can find the thief. With the help of his son, Antonio combs the city, becoming desperate for justice.
movie.tagline: The Prize Picture They Want to Censor!
movie.title: Bicycle Thieves

cast.name: Giulio Battiferri
cast.character: Citizen Who Protects the Real Thief (uncredited)

results.name: Suso Cecchi D'Amico on BICYCLES THIEVES

ads.provider_name: Amazon Prime Video Free with Ads
